pkgmetadata.longdescription: A preprocessor that reads Haskell with arrow notation and outputs Haskell 98. Note that GHC 6.2 or later has built-in support for arrow notation, so if you're only using GHC, you don't need this preprocessor: just rename your arrow module as an ordinary Haskell source file and invoke GHC with the -farrows option. You'll get better error messages for arrow code, too.
